title: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards: The Spine of a Militarized State
summary_full: With their pervasive military, political and economic clout, the Guards are often considered the main impediment to regime change, or any change, in Iran.
summary_public: With their pervasive military, political and economic clout, the Guards are often considered the main impediment to regime change, or any change, in Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: pervasive military, political and economic clout
